promptDescription: - **timearcs** — temporal arc diagram showing pairwise relationships between named entities over time. Each event draws a semicircular arc (curving right) at the event's time position, connecting two entity rows. Arc thickness = value/count; color = category. Best for co-occurrence, collaboration, attack flows, or interaction networks across time. IMPORTANT rules: (1) `year` must be a plain integer — for datetime columns use EXTRACT(year FROM col)::int or DATE_PART; for finer granularity use YYYYMM (e.g. 202403) or day-of-year integer. (2) Use lazy SQL: run the query first to verify it, then embed that exact SQL as `"sql":"SELECT..."` in the spec — the browser fetches the full data via /query. Column aliases must be: year, source, target (or destination), category (optional), value (optional, default COUNT(*)). (3) Aggregate with GROUP BY (year, source, target, category) + COUNT(*) AS value unless the user needs row-level detail. (4) Do NOT restrict entities or add a top-level LIMIT on the final result — return all matching rows so the visualization can display all entities. Spec: { "type":"timearcs", "title":"...", "sql":"SELECT EXTRACT(year FROM col)::int AS year, src AS source, dst AS target, type AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM tbl GROUP BY 1,2,3,4", "timeRange":[startInt, endInt] }. Omit timeRange to auto-detect. Render-side note: entities sharing an identical set of (partner, category) pairs (year and value ignored) auto-collapse into a single 'Group N (k)' row to reduce arc clutter; clicking the row toggles back to the full ungrouped view.
renderScript: function(wrap,spec){var PAD_L=155,PAD_R=30,PAD_T=12,PAD_B=40,ROW_H=28,MAX_ENT=10000;var NS='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';var el=function(tag,attrs,par){var e=document.createElementNS(NS,tag);Object.keys(attrs||{}).forEach(function(k){e.setAttribute(k,attrs[k]);});if(par)par.appendChild(e);return e;};var tx=function(tag,attrs,val,par){var e=el(tag,attrs,par);e.textContent=val;return e;};var toInt=function(y){if(y==null)return NaN;if(typeof y==='number')return Math.floor(y);var s=String(y).trim();if(/^\d{4}-\d{2}/.test(s))return parseInt(s.substring(0,4),10);if(/^\d{10}$/.test(s))return new Date(parseInt(s,10)*1000).getFullYear();if(/^\d{13}$/.test(s))return new Date(parseInt(s,10)).getFullYear();var n=parseInt(s,10);return isNaN(n)?NaN:n;};var rawEv=spec.events||[];var events0=rawEv.map(function(ev){return{year:toInt(ev.year),source:String(ev.source||''),target:String(ev.target||''),category:ev.category||'',value:+(ev.value||1),label:ev.label||''};}).filter(function(ev){return ev.source&&ev.target&&ev.source!==ev.target&&!isNaN(ev.year);});if(!events0.length){wrap.style.padding='12px';wrap.style.color='#888';wrap.textContent='TimeArcs: no valid events — need source, target, and an integer year field.';return;}var specEnts=spec.entities||[];var entList0=specEnts.length?specEnts.slice():(function(){var seen={},list=[];events0.forEach(function(ev){if(!seen[ev.source]){seen[ev.source]=1;list.push(ev.source);}if(!seen[ev.target]){seen[ev.target]=1;list.push(ev.target);}});return list;})();if(entList0.length>MAX_ENT){var cnt={};events0.forEach(function(ev){cnt[ev.source]=(cnt[ev.source]||0)+1;cnt[ev.target]=(cnt[ev.target]||0)+1;});entList0=entList0.slice().sort(function(a,b){return(cnt[b]||0)-(cnt[a]||0);}).slice(0,MAX_ENT);var es={};entList0.forEach(function(e){es[e]=1;});events0=events0.filter(function(ev){return es[ev.source]&&es[ev.target];});}var sigMap={};entList0.forEach(function(e){sigMap[e]={};});events0.forEach(function(ev){if(sigMap[ev.source])sigMap[ev.source][ev.target+'|'+ev.category]=1;if(sigMap[ev.target])sigMap[ev.target][ev.source+'|'+ev.category]=1;});Object.keys(sigMap).forEach(function(e){sigMap[e]=Object.keys(sigMap[e]).sort();});var bySig={};entList0.forEach(function(e){var k=sigMap[e].join('||');if(!bySig[k])bySig[k]=[];bySig[k].push(e);});var entToGid={},gInfo={},gIdx=0;Object.keys(bySig).forEach(function(k){var m=bySig[k];if(m.length>=2){gIdx++;var gid='__grp_'+gIdx;gInfo[gid]={members:m,idx:gIdx,expanded:false,kind:'twin',displayLabel:'Group '+gIdx+' ('+m.length+')'};m.forEach(function(x){entToGid[x]=gid;});}});var partnersOf={};entList0.forEach(function(e){if(!entToGid[e])partnersOf[e]={};});events0.forEach(function(ev){if(partnersOf[ev.source])partnersOf[ev.source][ev.target]=1;if(partnersOf[ev.target])partnersOf[ev.target][ev.source]=1;});var leafByHub={};Object.keys(partnersOf).forEach(function(e){var ps=Object.keys(partnersOf[e]);if(ps.length===1){var hub=ps[0];if(!leafByHub[hub])leafByHub[hub]=[];leafByHub[hub].push(e);}});Object.keys(leafByHub).forEach(function(hub){var leaves=leafByHub[hub];if(leaves.length>=2){gIdx++;var gid='__hub_'+gIdx;gInfo[gid]={members:leaves,idx:gIdx,expanded:false,kind:'hub',hub:hub,displayLabel:'Leaves of '+hub+' ('+leaves.length+')'};leaves.forEach(function(x){entToGid[x]=gid;});}});var forceOrder=function(ents,evs){var n=ents.length;if(n<=2)return ents.slice();var adj={};ents.forEach(function(e){adj[e]={};});evs.forEach(function(ev){if(!adj[ev.source]||!adj[ev.target]||ev.source===ev.target)return;var w=ev.value||1;adj[ev.source][ev.target]=(adj[ev.source][ev.target]||0)+w;adj[ev.target][ev.source]=(adj[ev.target][ev.source]||0)+w;});var catW={};evs.forEach(function(ev){if(!ev.category)return;var add=function(e,v){if(!catW[e])catW[e]={};catW[e][ev.category]=(catW[e][ev.category]||0)+v;};add(ev.source,ev.value||1);add(ev.target,ev.value||1);});var domCat={};ents.forEach(function(e){if(!catW[e]){domCat[e]='';return;}var best='',bv=0;Object.keys(catW[e]).forEach(function(c){if(catW[e][c]>bv){best=c;bv=catW[e][c];}});domCat[e]=best;});var deg={};ents.forEach(function(e){var s=0;Object.keys(adj[e]).forEach(function(o){s+=adj[e][o];});deg[e]=s;});var order=ents.slice().sort(function(a,b){return(deg[b]||0)-(deg[a]||0);});var BARY_ITERS=n<=60?80:n<=200?50:30;for(var iter=0;iter<BARY_ITERS;iter++){var pos={};order.forEach(function(e,i){pos[e]=i;});var bary={};order.forEach(function(e){var sum=0,w=0;Object.keys(adj[e]).forEach(function(o){var aw=adj[e][o];sum+=pos[o]*aw;w+=aw;});bary[e]=w>0?sum/w:pos[e];});order.sort(function(a,b){return(bary[a]-bary[b])||(pos[a]-pos[b]);});}var CAT_BONUS=0.5;var totalCost=function(ord){var p={};ord.forEach(function(e,i){p[e]=i;});var c=0;ord.forEach(function(e){Object.keys(adj[e]).forEach(function(o){var po=p[o];if(po==null||po<=p[e])return;c+=(po-p[e])*adj[e][o];});});for(var i=0;i<ord.length-1;i++){if(domCat[ord[i]]&&domCat[ord[i]]===domCat[ord[i+1]])c-=CAT_BONUS;}return c;};if(n<=150){var maxK=n<=60?3:2;for(var pass=0;pass<30;pass++){var moved=false;var current=totalCost(order);for(var k=1;k<=maxK&&!moved;k++){for(var i=0;i+k<=n&&!moved;i++){for(var j=0;j+k<=n&&!moved;j++){if(j===i)continue;var block=order.slice(i,i+k);var rest=order.slice(0,i).concat(order.slice(i+k));var newOrder=rest.slice(0,j).concat(block,rest.slice(j));if(totalCost(newOrder)<current-1e-9){order=newOrder;moved=true;}}}}if(!moved)break;}}else{var posMap={};order.forEach(function(e,i){posMap[e]=i;});var swapDelta=function(i){var a=order[i],b=order[i+1],d=0;var ka=Object.keys(adj[a]);for(var x=0;x<ka.length;x++){var o=ka[x];if(o===b)continue;var po=posMap[o];if(po==null)continue;d+=(Math.abs(po-(i+1))-Math.abs(po-i))*adj[a][o];}var kb=Object.keys(adj[b]);for(var x=0;x<kb.length;x++){var o=kb[x];if(o===a)continue;var po=posMap[o];if(po==null)continue;d+=(Math.abs(po-i)-Math.abs(po-(i+1)))*adj[b][o];}var mb=0,ma=0;if(i>0){var lc=domCat[order[i-1]];if(lc){if(lc===domCat[a])mb++;if(lc===domCat[b])ma++;}}if(i+2<n){var rc=domCat[order[i+2]];if(rc){if(rc===domCat[b])mb++;if(rc===domCat[a])ma++;}}d+=(mb-ma)*CAT_BONUS;return d;};for(var pass=0;pass<30;pass++){var moved=false;for(var i=0;i<n-1;i++){if(swapDelta(i)<-1e-9){var t=order[i];order[i]=order[i+1];order[i+1]=t;posMap[order[i]]=i;posMap[order[i+1]]=i+1;moved=true;}}if(!moved)break;}}return order;};var cats=[];events0.forEach(function(e){if(e.category&&cats.indexOf(e.category)<0)cats.push(e.category);});var PAL=['#5470c6','#ee6666','#91cc75','#fac858','#73c0de','#fc8452','#9a60b4','#3ba272','#ea7ccc'];var cCol=function(cat){var i=cats.indexOf(cat);return i<0?'#888':PAL[i%PAL.length];};wrap.innerHTML='';wrap.style.userSelect='none';wrap.style.maxHeight='1000px';wrap.style.overflowY='auto';var hdr=document.createElement('div');hdr.style.cssText='position:sticky;top:0;z-index:5;background:var(--bg,#fff);padding:4px 0 6px;';wrap.appendChild(hdr);if(spec.title){var ttl=document.createElement('div');ttl.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text,#333);margin-bottom:4px;';ttl.textContent=spec.title;hdr.appendChild(ttl);}if(gIdx>0){var note=document.createElement('div');note.style.cssText='text-align:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text3,#999);margin-bottom:2px;';note.textContent=gIdx+' collapsed group'+(gIdx>1?'s':'')+' (twins + hub-leaves) — click ▶ to expand, ▼ to collapse';hdr.appendChild(note);}var catVisible={};cats.forEach(function(c){catVisible[c]=true;});var legendItems=[];var grpBtn=null,catBtn=null;if(gIdx>0||cats.length>1){var btnRow=document.createElement('div');btnRow.style.cssText='display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;';var mkBtn=function(lbl){var b=document.createElement('button');b.style.cssText='font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid var(--border2,#ccc);background:transparent;color:var(--text,#444);cursor:pointer;';b.textContent=lbl;return b;};if(gIdx>0){grpBtn=mkBtn('Expand all groups');grpBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){var anyC=Object.keys(gInfo).some(function(k){return !gInfo[k].expanded;});Object.keys(gInfo).forEach(function(k){gInfo[k].expanded=anyC;});render();});btnRow.appendChild(grpBtn);}if(cats.length>1){catBtn=mkBtn('Hide all categories');catBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){var anyOn=cats.some(function(c){return catVisible[c];});cats.forEach(function(c){catVisible[c]=!anyOn;});render();});btnRow.appendChild(catBtn);}hdr.appendChild(btnRow);}if(cats.length>1){var lgd=document.createElement('div');lgd.style.cssText='display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:4px 14px;padding:0 8px;';cats.forEach(function(cat){var itm=document.createElement('span');itm.style.cssText='display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text2,#666);white-space:nowrap;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;';var sw=document.createElement('span');sw.style.cssText='display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:2px;flex-shrink:0;background:'+cCol(cat)+';';itm.appendChild(sw);itm.appendChild(document.createTextNode(cat));itm.addEventListener('click',function(){catVisible[cat]=!catVisible[cat];render();});lgd.appendChild(itm);legendItems.push({el:itm,cat:cat});});hdr.appendChild(lgd);}var svgWrap=document.createElement('div');svgWrap.style.cssText='overflow-x:auto;';wrap.appendChild(svgWrap);var render=function(){if(grpBtn){var anyCol=Object.keys(gInfo).some(function(k){return !gInfo[k].expanded;});grpBtn.textContent=anyCol?'Expand all groups':'Collapse all groups';}if(catBtn){var anyVis=cats.some(function(c){return catVisible[c];});catBtn.textContent=anyVis?'Hide all categories':'Show all categories';}legendItems.forEach(function(it){var on=!!catVisible[it.cat];it.el.style.opacity=on?'1':'0.35';it.el.style.textDecoration=on?'none':'line-through';});var visEvents=events0.filter(function(ev){return !ev.category||catVisible[ev.category];});var dEnts=[],lblOf={},isG={},seenG={};entList0.forEach(function(e){var gid=entToGid[e];if(gid&&!gInfo[gid].expanded){if(!seenG[gid]){dEnts.push(gid);lblOf[gid]='▶ '+gInfo[gid].displayLabel;isG[gid]=true;seenG[gid]=true;}}else{dEnts.push(e);lblOf[e]=(gid&&gInfo[gid].expanded)?('▼ '+e):e;isG[e]=false;}});var dEvMap={};visEvents.forEach(function(ev){var sg=entToGid[ev.source],tg=entToGid[ev.target];var s=(sg&&!gInfo[sg].expanded)?sg:ev.source;var t=(tg&&!gInfo[tg].expanded)?tg:ev.target;if(s===t)return;var key=ev.year+'|'+[s,t].sort().join('|')+'|'+ev.category;if(!dEvMap[key])dEvMap[key]={year:ev.year,source:s,target:t,category:ev.category,value:ev.value,label:ev.label};});var events=Object.keys(dEvMap).map(function(k){return dEvMap[k];});var entities=dEnts;if(!specEnts.length){entities=forceOrder(dEnts,events);}var minY,maxY;if(spec.timeRange){minY=spec.timeRange[0];maxY=spec.timeRange[1];}else if(events.length){var qmin=Infinity,qmax=-Infinity;for(var qi=0;qi<events.length;qi++){var qy=events[qi].year;if(qy<qmin)qmin=qy;if(qy>qmax)qmax=qy;}minY=qmin;maxY=qmax;}else{minY=0;maxY=1;}if(minY===maxY){minY-=1;maxY+=1;}var W=Math.max(400,(wrap.clientWidth||wrap.offsetWidth||800)-32);var H=PAD_T+entities.length*ROW_H+PAD_B;var TW=W-PAD_L-PAD_R;var SPAN=Math.max(1,maxY-minY);var MIN_STEP=120;TW=Math.max(TW,SPAN*MIN_STEP);var xOf=function(yr){return PAD_L+(yr-minY)/(maxY-minY)*TW;};var posOf={};entities.forEach(function(e,i){posOf[e]=i;});var yOf=function(n){var i=posOf[n];return(i==null)?-9999:PAD_T+i*ROW_H;};svgWrap.innerHTML='';var svg=el('svg',{width:PAD_L+TW+PAD_R,height:H,style:'cursor:grab;display:block'},svgWrap);el('rect',{x:0,y:0,width:'100%',height:H,fill:'var(--bg,#fff)'},svg);var g=el('g',{},svg);entities.forEach(function(name,idx){var y=yOf(name);el('line',{x1:PAD_L,y1:y,x2:W-PAD_R,y2:y,stroke:'var(--border,#eee)','stroke-width':'1'},g);var rawLbl=lblOf[name]||name;var lblShort=rawLbl.length>22?rawLbl.slice(0,21)+'…':rawLbl;var isExpMem=!isG[name]&&entToGid[name]&&gInfo[entToGid[name]].expanded;var clickGid=isG[name]?name:(isExpMem?entToGid[name]:null);var textAttrs={x:PAD_L-8,y:y+4,'text-anchor':'end','font-size':'11',fill:isG[name]?'#5470c6':(isExpMem?'#e63946':'var(--text,#444)')};if(clickGid)textAttrs['font-weight']='600';var textEl=tx('text',textAttrs,lblShort,g);if(clickGid){textEl.style.cursor='pointer';textEl.addEventListener('click',function(ev){ev.stopPropagation();gInfo[clickGid].expanded=!gInfo[clickGid].expanded;render();});var tt=document.createElementNS(NS,'title');tt.textContent=isG[name]?('Click to expand: '+gInfo[name].members.slice(0,8).join(', ')+(gInfo[name].members.length>8?', …':'')):'Click to collapse '+gInfo[clickGid].displayLabel;textEl.appendChild(tt);}});var axY=PAD_T+entities.length*ROW_H+14;el('line',{x1:PAD_L,y1:axY,x2:W-PAD_R,y2:axY,stroke:'var(--border2,#ccc)','stroke-width':'1'},g);var span=maxY-minY;var step=span<=5?1:span<=15?2:span<=30?5:10;for(var yr=minY;yr<=maxY;yr++){var xyr=xOf(yr);if(xyr<PAD_L-1||xyr>W-PAD_R+1)continue;el('line',{x1:xyr,y1:axY,x2:xyr,y2:axY+(yr%step===0?6:3),stroke:'var(--border2,#ccc)','stroke-width':'1'},g);if(yr%step===0)tx('text',{x:xyr,y:axY+16,'text-anchor':'middle','font-size':'10',fill:'var(--text3,#999)'},''+yr,g);}var act={};events.forEach(function(ev){[ev.source,ev.target].forEach(function(ent){if(!ent||yOf(ent)<0)return;if(!act[ent])act[ent]={};act[ent][ev.year]=(act[ent][ev.year]||0)+ev.value;});});var maxAct=1;Object.keys(act).forEach(function(ent){Object.keys(act[ent]).forEach(function(yr){if(act[ent][yr]>maxAct)maxAct=act[ent][yr];});});entities.forEach(function(name){var y=yOf(name);var m=act[name]||{};Object.keys(m).forEach(function(yr){var cnt=m[yr];var bh=Math.max(3,cnt/maxAct*16);var ax=xOf(+yr);if(ax<PAD_L||ax>W-PAD_R)return;el('rect',{x:ax-2.5,y:y-bh/2,width:5,height:bh,rx:'2',fill:'var(--accent,#5470c6)',opacity:'0.3'},g);});});var dup={};events.forEach(function(ev){var y1=yOf(ev.source),y2=yOf(ev.target);if(y1<0||y2<0||y1===y2)return;var pk=ev.year+'|'+[ev.source,ev.target].sort().join('|');if(!dup[pk])dup[pk]=0;var xb=xOf(ev.year)+dup[pk]*3;dup[pk]++;var ya=Math.min(y1,y2),yb=Math.max(y1,y2),r=(yb-ya)/2;var d='M '+xb+' '+ya+' A '+r+' '+r+' 0 0 1 '+xb+' '+yb;var sw=Math.min(6,Math.max(1.5,ev.value*1.5));var col=ev.category?cCol(ev.category):'#888';var path=el('path',{d:d,fill:'none',stroke:col,'stroke-width':''+sw,opacity:'0.65','stroke-linecap':'round',cursor:'pointer'},g);var srcLbl=(lblOf[ev.source]||ev.source).replace(/^[▶▼] /,'');var tgtLbl=(lblOf[ev.target]||ev.target).replace(/^[▶▼] /,'');var tt=document.createElementNS(NS,'title');tt.textContent=srcLbl+' ↔ '+tgtLbl+' · '+ev.year+(ev.category?' · '+ev.category:'')+(ev.value?' · count:'+ev.value:'')+(ev.label?' | '+ev.label:'');path.appendChild(tt);path.addEventListener('mouseenter',function(){path.setAttribute('opacity','1');path.setAttribute('stroke-width',''+(sw*1.6));});path.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){path.setAttribute('opacity','0.65');path.setAttribute('stroke-width',''+sw);});});var zoom={scale:1,tx:0,ty:0};var drag={active:false,sx:0,sy:0,stx:0,sty:0};var applyT=function(){g.setAttribute('transform','translate('+zoom.tx+','+zoom.ty+') scale('+zoom.scale+')');};svg.addEventListener('wheel',function(e){e.preventDefault();var f=e.deltaY<0?1.12:0.89;var rect=svg.getBoundingClientRect();var mx=e.clientX-rect.left,my=e.clientY-rect.top;zoom.tx=mx+(zoom.tx-mx)*f;zoom.ty=my+(zoom.ty-my)*f;zoom.scale*=f;applyT();},{passive:false});svg.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){drag.active=true;drag.sx=e.clientX;drag.sy=e.clientY;drag.stx=zoom.tx;drag.sty=zoom.ty;svg.style.cursor='grabbing';e.preventDefault();});svg.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){if(!drag.active)return;zoom.tx=drag.stx+(e.clientX-drag.sx);zoom.ty=drag.sty+(e.clientY-drag.sy);applyT();});svg.addEventListener('mouseup',function(){drag.active=false;svg.style.cursor='grab';});svg.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){drag.active=false;svg.style.cursor='grab';});svg.addEventListener('dblclick',function(){zoom={scale:1,tx:0,ty:0};applyT();});};render();}
